description: Error-taxonomy parity cases that pin behaviour the two resolvers must agree on: (1) parseSignatureArgs rejects an unknown descriptor char (e.g. 'Q') as a malformed-input IllegalArgument; (2) overload disambiguation against an unmapped class-name arg type raises the DISTINCT UnknownArgType error (a Resolve subtype) rather than the generic no-overload-matches Resolve, while a legitimate no-match still raises the generic Resolve; (3) the canonical miss WORDING both resolvers emit, pinned via `expectMessageIncludes`: a class miss reads `class '<name>' not found in map for <app>@<version>.` and a member miss reads `<kind> '<name>' not found on class '<class>' in map for <app>@<version>.`. The asserted substring deliberately EXCLUDES the per-client brand prefix (`rosetta-frida:` / `rosetta-xposed:`), which is intentionally different; everything after the prefix is byte-identical across clients. Provider-neutral; see README.md.

cases.name: unmapped class-name arg type raises the distinct UnknownArgType error
all arg types known but no overload matches raises the generic Resolve error
class miss message reads "class '<name>' not found in map for <app>@<version>"
cases.expectMessageIncludes: class 'com.example.app.DoesNotExist' not found in map for com.example.app@1.0.0.

cases.name: method miss message reads "method '<name>' not found on class '<class>' in map for <app>@<version>"
cases.expectMessageIncludes: method 'noSuchMethod' not found on class 'com.example.app.Sink' in map for com.example.app@1.0.0.

cases.name: field miss message reads "field '<name>' not found on class '<class>' in map for <app>@<version>"
cases.expectMessageIncludes: field 'noSuchField' not found on class 'com.example.app.Sink' in map for com.example.app@1.0.0.
